differential_diagnoses: Nutritional optic neuropathy (Vitamin B12 or folate deficiency)
next_steps: Measure serum vitamin B12, folate, and copper levels
Obtain comprehensive nutritional evaluation by a dietitian
Initiate vitamin A supplementation (oral or intramuscular as indicated)
Ophthalmology consultation for detailed assessment of corneal and retinal integrity
Consult pediatric neurology for assessment of optic disk findings
